nats.label: NATS
nats.description: NATS Agent Protocol channel — exposes each OpenClaw agent on the NATS network so other clients can discover and prompt it.

accounts.description: Per-account NATS connections. Key is the account id (use "default" for the single-account case).

agentName.description: Agent identity advertised on the NATS network (becomes the discoverable agent name).

url.description: NATS server URL (e.g. nats://demo.nats.io:4222). Comma-separated list supported for clusters.

description.description: Free-form blurb shown during agent discovery.

credentials.description: Path to a NATS .creds file. Overridden by $NATS_CREDENTIALS at runtime.

context.description: Name of a NATS CLI context (file under ~/.config/nats/context/<name>.json) to source url + credentials from. Per-field url/credentials and the $NATS_* env vars still take precedence.

enabled.description: Disable this account without removing it from the config.

owner.description: Operator/account segment used in the NATS subject namespace (3rd token). Defaults to "default" when unset.

org.description: Deprecated alias of `owner`, still accepted for backward compatibility. Emits a warning at resolve time — please rename to `owner`.

agentName.description: Agent identity on the NATS network

context.description: NATS CLI context name; sources url + credentials

owner.description: Operator/account segment in the NATS subject namespace
